title: True / False / Not Given
instructions: Write TRUE, FALSE or NOT GIVEN.

questions.statement: The exclusion zone was established after the 1986 accident.
Radiation has benefited animal populations more than the absence of humans.
Brown bears and European bison have returned to the area.
The Red Forest recovered within ten years of the accident.
The greater spotted eagle is sensitive to human disturbance.
Tree frogs in the zone are lighter than usual.
All species in the exclusion zone have benefited from radiation.
Similar wildlife recovery has been observed near Fukushima.
Scientists know exactly how every organism adapts to radiation.
The author argues that nuclear disasters should be used as conservation tools.
